ttm_memory_fix.evidence: No mention of TTM pages_limit at all. OOM troubleshooting only suggests reducing context size or using smaller quantization.

correct_gpu_target.evidence: Uses AMDGPU_TARGETS="gfx1151" (slightly different flag name but correct concept). Note: says gfx1151 not gfx1150.

hipblaslt_env.evidence: No mention of ROCBLAS_USE_HIPBLASLT=1. Environment variables section suggests HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES, GPU_MAX_HW_QUEUES, AMD_SERIALIZE_KERNEL instead.

no_mmap_flag.evidence: Does not recommend --no-mmap. No mention of mmap-related issues for large models.

full_gpu_offload.evidence: -ngl 99 recommended with explanation about offloading all 80 layers

quantization_recommendation.evidence: Recommends Q4_K_M for speed, also mentions Q8_0 as option with 128GB RAM
